user.title: WLED Progress Bar – Connect
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your WLED device and the Home Assistant entity whose value should be displayed.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to WLED device – check the host/IP and ensure WLED is reachable.

abort.already_configured: This WLED device is already configured.

init.title: WLED Progress Bar – Scaling & LED Range

data.background_color: Background color (r,g,b) – used when 'Background off' is disabled

error.min_gte_max: Minimum value must be less than maximum value.
error.led_start_gte_end: LED start index must be less than LED end index.
error.invalid_rgb: Invalid RGB value – use the format r,g,b where each component is 0–255.
